items.name: mohd-musheer.github.io
items.description: I specialize in systems-level machine learning, high-performance C++ development, transformer-based NLP, and scalable AI deployment. I build frameworks, optimize performance, and ship real-world AI systems — not just experiments.

items.name: AI-Driven-Digital-Twin-GBM-Drug-Response-
items.description: AI-driven Digital Twin framework for mutation-based targeted therapy response prediction in Glioblastoma using interpretable machine learning.

items.name: TransBoundary-Air-Intelligence-ML-GIS
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning and GIS framework for modelling and mapping transboundary air pollution influence across countries (2016–2024).

items.name: Microexon-Regulatory-Modeling-via-SVR-and-SHAP
items.description: High-throughput machine learning pipeline designed to decode the regulatory logic of microexon splicing. The framework uses Support Vector Regression (SVR) to predict microexon inclusion levels (PSI) based on the expression profiles of Splicing Factors (SFs), utilizing SHAP values to identify the primary regulatory drivers.

items.name: Leveraging-Random-Forest-Regression-and-KNN-for-Predicting
items.description: The Cryptocurrency Market Analysis project focused on studying digital currency price fluctuations and trading behaviors using big data frameworks and machine learning models. The aim was to analyze volatility, detect correlations, and forecast short-term market movements.

items.name: OSML
items.description: Opportunistic Statistical Machine Learning: Proprietary Advanced Regime Detection Framework. Detects invisible drift before it becomes a failure.

items.name: Clinical-AI-QA-Framework
items.description: Automated QA framework for machine learning models in medical imaging

items.name: ml-hcp-uplift-segmentation
items.description: End-to-End Machine Learning Framework for HCP ROI-Based Segmentation Using Uplift Modeling

items.name: DeltaQuill
items.description: Stylometric Fingerprinting: Writing Analysis and Authorship Detection Engine is a stylometry framework that identifies authorship by analyzing lexical, syntactic, and statistical features, including Burrows's Delta, and applying machine learning to detect distinctive writing patterns across texts.

items.name: nifty50-return-direction-forecasting
items.description: This project develops and evaluates a predictive framework for forecasting next-day NIFTY 50 index direction using technical indicators and machine learning models.

items.name: SecureBoost
items.description: Privacy Preserving Machine Learning Project (SecureBoost Framework)

items.name: sktime
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning with time series

items.name: EMS
items.description: XAJ-based Physics-Informed Machine Learning Framework for Runoff Prediction

items.name: Projects_with_tf
items.description: Machine learning projects performed using Tensorflow framework.

items.name: organizational-ml-governance-framework
items.description: Enterprise-grade Machine Learning governance framework implementing full lifecycle management for ML models with data validation, feature engineering, model registry, and monitoring capabilities.

items.name: VectorForgeML
items.description: VectorForge ML is a modular machine learning framework built from scratch in C++, designed for performance and extensibility. The project focuses on implementing core ML algorithms manually and gradually evolving into a high-performance research-grade engine with optional R integration.

items.name: go-coreml
items.description: Go bindings to Apple's CoreML framework for high-performance machine learning inference on Apple Silicon.

items.name: ml-milp-ev-fleet-optimization
items.description: Integrated machine learning and mixed-integer optimization framework for HVAC-aware electric fleet routing under uncertainty.

items.name: VectorForgeML
items.description: :exclamation: This is a read-only mirror of the CRAN R package repository.  VectorForgeML — High-Performance Machine Learning Framework with C++ Acceleration. Homepage: https://vectorforgeml.work.gd  Report bugs for this package: https://github.com/mohd-musheer/VectorForgeML/issues

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: Credit-Risk-Modelling
items.description: Machine learning projects in credit risk and financial decision modelling, including credit card approval classification and an end-to-end IFRS 9 Expected Credit Loss (ECL) framework with PD modelling and staging.

items.name: social-twins
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: TimeFlies
items.description: Machine learning framework for aging analysis in Drosophila single-cell RNA-seq   data. Deep learning models with SHAP interpretability, batch correction, and   comprehensive research workflows.

items.name: numpy-nn-model
items.description: Сustom torch style machine learning framework with automatic differentiation implemented on numpy, allows build GANs, VAEs, etc.

items.name: UiVibe
items.description: Elevating enterprise UX with adaptive performance scaling and predictive analytics-driven machine learning capabilities within a robust framework.

items.name: fastapi-vss
items.description: RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.

items.name: BackZen
items.description: Edge-driven, auto-scaling BackZen framework for intelligent, distributed systems leveraging machine learning optimization and adaptive resource orchestration.

items.name: GeoFloodPredict
items.description: A machine learning–based flood risk prediction system that utilizes open geospatial and meteorological data to identify urban flood-prone zones. By integrating GIS processing, digital elevation models, rainfall data, and feature engineering techniques, the project aims to develop a cost-effective and scalable predictive framework.

items.name: MAIES
items.description: MAIES (Multi-Agent Intelligent EDA System) is an AI-driven analytics framework that automates exploratory data analysis using a collaborative multi-agent architecture. It interprets user intent, profiles datasets, detects risks and patterns, and recommends optimal machine learning strategies — all through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: Zi
items.description: A high-performance data processing engine built with Rust, designed for modern machine learning workflows. Zi provides a unified framework for data quality assessment, cleaning, transformation, sampling, and augmentation with exceptional speed and reliability.

items.name: AI-Driven-Human-Resource-Management-System
items.description: This repository contains the synthetic dataset and Python implementation for an AI-driven hospital HRM framework. It supports workforce demand forecasting, intelligent staff scheduling, and performance evaluation using machine learning, optimization, and NLP for research, experimentation, and reproducible healthcare workforce analytics.

items.name: CSANet
items.description: An automated framework for identifying harmonic-generating loads in power systems using Current Signature Analysis (CSA) and Machine Learning classifiers like SVM and Random Forest.

items.name: omnivinci
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: A-term-structure-framework-for-green-bond-spreads-and-portfolio-strategies
items.description: Replication code for "A Term Structure Framework for Green Bond Spreads and Portfolio Strategies." Includes R scripts for curve-based green bond yield spread calculation, machine learning-based attribute screening via Association Rule Learning, and green bond portfolio construction and evaluation.

items.name: BIST-Weekly-ML-Stock-Selection-System
items.description: A machine learning–based weekly stock selection and backtesting framework for BIST equities.

items.name: causal-decision-framework
items.description: Bridging the gap between Machine Learning and Causal Inference with rigorous experimental design in R

items.name: potato-blight-forecasting
items.description: Simulation-Based Machine Learning Framework for Potato Late Blight Forecasting

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: MULTI-evolve
items.description: MULTI-evolve: a machine learning-guided end-to-end framework for engineering hyperactive multi-mutant proteins

items.name: Pycluster
items.description: PyCluster is a Windows-optimized distributed computing framework built on Dask that simplifies cluster orchestration, task parallelism, and AI workload management.  It provides a head node–worker architecture with real-time dashboard monitoring, REST API integration, and optional GPU awareness for machine learning and lLLM workloads.

items.name: C-ML
items.description: Machine learning framework written in C.

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: Cross-League-Performance-Translation-Model
items.description: A machine learning framework that translates football player performance metrics across leagues to predict how a player would perform in a different competitive environment.  Built to answer one core question:  “If a player moves from League A to League B, how will their performance translate?”

items.name: TASI-Hybrid-Pred
items.description: TASI-Hybrid-Pred is a residual-correction machine learning framework for predicting mid-term stock price movements in the Saudi Stock Market (TASI) using ensemble learning and technical indicators.

items.name: datamate
items.description: Datamate is a data and configuration management framework in Python for machine-learning research. It uses the filesystem as memory through Directory objects, providing a programming interface to store and retrieve files in hierarchical structures using HDF5.

items.name: Automated_MLOps_Framework_for_Customer_Churn_Prediction
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning operations (MLOps) framework for predicting customer churn in the telecommunications industry. This project demonstrates end-to-end ML pipeline development including data preprocessing, model training, hyperparameter optimization, drift detection, and deployment with an interactive web interface.

items.name: BootCtrl-EdgeOS
items.description: A Machine Learning Framework for IEC 61499

items.name: Intrusion_Detection_Big_Data
items.description: I investigated how distributed big data frameworks can enhance the scalability and effectiveness of machine learning-based IDS in large-scale environments. Used CICIDS2017 4.9GB dataset, comprising over 1.4mil network traffic records and 15 attack classes, experiments were conducted in a Databricks Serverless environment using Apache Spark 4.1.0.

items.name: VoltAI-Battery-Health-Prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for EV battery SoH and RUL prediction using NASA dataset with GroupKFlod validation and tune SVR.

items.name: Conditional-Estimation-and-Scenario-Based-Projection-of-the-Heat-Index
items.description: Machine-Learning Framework for Conditional Estimation and Scenario-Based Projection of the Heat Index for Public Health Interventions

items.name: ONeSAMP_ML
items.description: Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics

items.name: Decision_Tree_OSN_Single_Chain
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting polymer membrane performance using single-chain molecular descriptors and decision tree classification

items.name: ihg_risk_poc
items.description: A full-featured MLOps framework built on Google Cloud Platform. This repository implements an end-to-end machine learning lifecycle with automated training, deployment, monitoring, and human-in-the-loop feedback.

items.name: AdvancedMachineLearning
items.description: Implement a vision-based anomaly detection framework for industrial inspection, comparing two images of which one depicts the correct example and one the currently realized tool/piece/object. Provide details on datasets, learning procedure and model architecture.

items.name: ML_Frameworks_JobInterviewGuide_Workshop
items.description: This workshop helps students prepare for a Junior Data Scientist job interview by combining machine learning review with AI-driven self-assessment.

items.name: VIPER
items.description: VIPER (VUS Interpretation using Probabilistic Evidence and Random Forest) - A machine learning framework for predictive interpretation of VUS in hereditary cancer genomics using ClinVar and VEP transcript-level annotations

items.name: spiml-fractured-aquifers
items.description: Reference implementation of the Structural Physics-Informed Machine Learning (SPIML) framework for fractured aquifers.

items.name: undergraduate-thesis
items.description: This repo features the code, input and output files for my undergraduate thesis titled "Design and optimization of an integrated computational and machine learning framework to detect functional variants and elucidate their contributions to biological pathways".

items.name: Near-Infrared-Spectroscopy
items.description: This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.

items.name: legendary-sniffleIntegrated-Design-of-Experiments-Machine-Learning-and-Optimization-algorithm
items.description: Contain my paper Integrated Design of Experiments and Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Variable Engineering Optimization Data and Jupitar Notebooks

items.name: Integrated-Design-of-Experiments-and-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Multi-Variable-Optimization
items.description: Contain my paper Integrated Design of Experiments and Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Variable Engineering Optimization Data and Jupitar Notebooks

items.name: AIP-G-1.0
items.description: The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3β, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3β inhibitors for Alzheimer’s disease.

items.name: dynamic-pricing-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for dynamic pricing in e-commerce, featuring customer segmentation, and cluster prediction

items.name: Email-trust
items.description: mail Spam Detection using ML is a robust machine learning application designed to automatically classify emails as either "Spam" or "Ham" (safe) based on their content. Built upon the high-performance FastAPI framework, it provides a responsive REST API that can easily integrate with web or mobile frontends.

items.name: Diabetes-prediction-using-Ml-and-django
items.description: Developed a Diabetic Prediction System using Machine Learning with Pandas and NumPy for data preprocessing and analysis. Implemented and compared KNN, Decision Tree, and MLP classifiers, improving accuracy through model evaluation and hyperparameter tuning.and Django backend framework

items.name: leo-cdp-framework
items.description: LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: Omnisense-Stress-Predictor
items.description: A multivariate machine learning framework for predicting student stress levels with 90%+ accuracy.

items.name: UNIVERSAL-CUSTOMER-CHURN-PREDICTION-SYSTEM
items.description: A Universal Customer Churn Prediction System is an advanced analytics framework designed to identify which customers are likely to stop using a service or product. The "universal" system is built to be industry-agnostic, capable of processing diverse data streams—from banking transactions to telecom usage—using a unified machine learning pipeline.

items.name: aby3
items.description: A Three Party MPC framework for Machine learning and Databases

items.name: Diabetes-prediction-using-Ml-and-django
items.description: Developed a Diabetic Prediction System using Machine Learning with Pandas and NumPy for data preprocessing and analysis. Implemented and compared KNN, Decision Tree, and MLP classifiers, improving accuracy through model evaluation and hyperparameter tuning.and Django backend framework

items.name: KC-ML-Framework
items.description: The **KC-ML framework** integrates biological priors (pathway enrichment and protein-protein interactions) as soft constraints into multi-model machine learning to improve feature stability and cross-cohort generalizability in transcriptomic prediction.

items.name: Bias-Detection
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Fairness Evaluation in Emergency Department Triage Predictions

items.name: healthcare-ai-modelling-framework
items.description: A modular computational research framework for building, evaluating, and analysing advanced machine learning models in healthcare and cognitive decision-making domains. Includes explainability, uncertainty analysis, and reproducible experimental pipelines.

items.name: market_sim_ml
items.description: Limit order book simulation and machine learning framework demonstrating that statistically significant short-term predictability can emerge even in a noise-dominated market.

items.name: market_simulation_and_forecasting
items.description: Limit order book simulation and machine learning benchmarking framework demonstrating that statistically significant short-term predictability can emerge even in a noise-dominated market.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: astro-lab
items.description: Astronomical machine learning framework with advanced data analysis and interactive 3D visualization capabilities.

items.name: quantum
items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.name: credit-risk-modeling-europe
items.description: Credit Risk Modeling project comparing Logistic Regression and Machine Learning approaches under a financial risk framework.

items.name: MistralQuantum
items.description: Cloud-Optimized, Machine Learning-Enhanced, Cloud-Agnostic Deployment Platform for Scalable, High-Performance Applications Development Framework.

items.name: credit-risk-modeling-europe
items.description: Credit Risk Modeling project comparing Logistic Regression and Machine Learning approaches under a financial risk framework.

items.name: british-airways-data-science
items.description: Engineered a machine learning pipeline that identify key drivers of air ticket booking and a predictive modelling framework that forecast premium lounge demand.

items.name: Predicting-no-shows-in-MRI-appointments
items.description: An interpretable machine learning framework to predict patient no-shows in radiology. While optimized for MRI, this methodology can be adapted for CT scans or other diagnostic procedures to improve clinic efficiency and scheduling. Published in the Journal of the Operational Research Society.

items.name: OverfitSwift
items.description: Context-Aware, Machine-Learning-Driven Application Platform with Auto-Scaling, Self-Healing, and Real-Time Predictive Analytics Framework.

items.name: SpliceML
items.description: Machine learning framework for mRNA alternative splicing analysis identifies a signature of progression in colorectal adenocarcinoma

items.name: A_Machine_Learning_and_Rule-Based_Approach_for_Data_Quality_Validation
items.description: A hybrid data quality framework integrating Pandera schema validation and unsupervised ML (Isolation Forest, DBSCAN and Local Outlier Factor) to secure traffic collision data. This modular pipeline automates geospatial and logical anomaly detection with 88.5% precision, delivering explainable reports via an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

items.name: TrackSelectorDNN
items.description: Machine Learning framework for training pixel track High-Purity online selection models for the Phase-2 High Level Trigger (HLT)

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.name: coevolutionary-episteme
items.description: A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

items.name: cognitive-valve
items.description: A machine learning dataset and architectural framework designed to address the crisis of cognitive overload in humans and language models considering current fast pace and high density of informational input, by establishing conceptual cognitive frames that align the entity with ecological sustainability and planetary symbiotic flourishing.

items.name: SCEgapfilled
items.description: A simple machine learning-based cloud gap-filling framework designed for fine-sclae snow cover mapping

items.description: untuk belajar tentang machine learning menggunakan framework fastapi dan dengan menerapkan algoritma regresi linier

items.name: TNBC_mutation_analysis
items.description: Source code and public data used for the project 'A machine learning framework for actionable genetic insights discovery: use in triple-negative breast cancer'.

items.name: NeuralNet
items.description: Machine Learning Accelerator utilizing High-Performance Distributed Processing, delivering Intelligent Scalable Real-Time Predictions via NeuralNetBoost Framework.

items.name: GRB-ML
items.description: Machine Learning-based framework for redshift estimation and cosmological parameter inference using Gamma-Ray Bursts as potential standard candles.

items.name: SwarmTorch
items.description: A distributed machine learning framework designed for real-world edge deployments where devices are resource-constrained, connections are unreliable and trust cannot be assumed. Built in Rust from the ground up, it brings swarm intelligence and federated learning primitives to environments where PyTorch and TensorFlow cannot operate.

items.name: AI-Driven-Telecom-Churn-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning-and-Deep-Learning
items.description: End-to-End AI Framework for Telecom Customer Churn Prediction Using Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Intelligent Customer Segmentation

items.name: eddy-coherence-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework to identify and predict Lagrangian coherence of eddies in the Gulf of Mexico using ADT, SST, and chlorophyll-a. Improves classification and lifetime prediction of LCEs and LCFEs, with enhanced accuracy from Chl-a assimilation into ocean models
